subtitle: Stock picks with full thesis
promotional_text: 97+ picks. Full thesis on every position. Real performance history. $0.99/month.
description:
Stock picks published when the market justifies it — with the full thesis: what the company does, why we picked it, the real risk we're watching, and the numbers that matter.

Not a generic newsletter. A real portfolio with a transparent track record from day one, performance published as-is — mistakes and all — and every position attested on blockchain so nothing can ever be edited retroactively.

WHAT YOU GET
• Full thesis on every pick: what the company does, why we picked it, the key risk
• Financial data: P/E ratio, forward P/E, market cap, analyst consensus
• Curated news that affects your portfolio — no noise
• Complete performance history (97+ picks across 20 cycles)
• Real-time portfolio with live prices and return per position
• Blockchain attestation: every pick timestamped with date, price, and thesis — immutable

HOW IT WORKS
We publish picks when the market presents an opportunity — that could be 1 or 2 in a day, or none for several days. We don't promise a fixed cadence: we promise every published pick is worth your attention.

You decide how much to invest per position. The amount doesn't matter — the consistency does. Pick a fixed size you're comfortable with — $5, $50, whatever fits your portfolio — and use that same amount on every single pick. That discipline is what makes the system work over time. Don't change it with every market move.

Every 3, 6, or 12 months, review whether to adjust. If your finances allow and the track record gives you confidence, size up. If you need to reduce exposure, size down. That's the only time to change it. The consistency between reviews is the edge.

WHAT WE'RE NOT
Vectorial Data is an editorial publishing service — not personalized investment advice. We operate under the publisher's exclusion (Section 202(a)(11)(D) of the U.S. Investment Advisers Act). Past performance does not guarantee future results. Always consult a qualified financial advisor.

SUBSCRIPTION
$0.99 per month. No contracts. Cancel anytime from your Apple ID settings.
Subscription automatically renews unless canceled at least 24 hours before the end of the current period.
release_notes: First release of Vectorial Data on the App Store.

subscription_product.description: Full access to all picks, research, and portfolio history.
